_metadata.description: MPG baselines for Aeroseal fleet vehicles. Used for fuel efficiency anomaly detection (Flag 1).

sources.EPA: fueleconomy.gov API — official EPA combined MPG for light-duty vehicles (GVWR < 8,500 lbs)
sources.MFR: Manufacturer published estimates for commercial vehicles exempt from EPA testing (GVWR > 8,500 lbs)
sources.MFR+RW: Manufacturer estimate cross-referenced with real-world data from Fuelly.com owner reports

notes: All MPG values are combined (city+highway weighted average)
Commercial vehicles (ProMaster, Transit cargo, Sprinter, Isuzu NPR, Ram 2500/3500) are EPA-exempt — estimates used
Flex Fuel vehicles baselined on regular gasoline. E85 use will be flagged separately under Flag 6
Ram 'Truck' vehicles with vehicle_type 'Van' in Fleetio are ProMaster cargo vans, not pickup trucks

11-Chevrolet-Truck-6443.epa_detail: 2011 Chevrolet Silverado C15 2WD, 5.3L V8, Flex Fuel (gasoline baseline)

11-GMC-Van-4650.epa_detail: 2011 GMC Savana 1500 2WD cargo, 5.3L V8, Flex Fuel (gasoline baseline)

14-Ford-Truck-8756.epa_detail: 2014 Ford F-250/F-350 Super Duty, 6.7L V8 turbo diesel (B20). Not EPA-tested. Manufacturer estimate 15-17 MPG combined.

15-Isuzu-Box-4588.epa_detail: 2015 Isuzu NPR/NPR-HD box truck, 5.2L 4cyl turbo diesel. Not EPA-tested. Manufacturer ~14 MPG, real-world 10-14 MPG loaded.

17-Ford-Van-6645.epa_detail: 2017 Ford Transit cargo van, 3.5L V6 PFDi, gasoline. EPA tests T-150 only (15/19/17). T-250/T-350 cargo est. ~16 combined.

18-Chevrolet-Truck-1637.epa_detail: 2018 Chevrolet Silverado C15 2WD, 5.3L V8, Regular gasoline

19-Chevrolet-Truck-5289.epa_detail: 2019 Chevrolet Silverado 2500/3500 HD, diesel (B20). Not EPA-tested. Manufacturer estimate 16-18 MPG combined.
